---
title: "Events"
---

*Upcoming Events* 

+ **JSM 2026 Business Meeting and Social Hour** 
  + August 2, 2026 6:00-8:00PM 
  + Westin Boston Seaport District Room W-Alcott
  + Business Meeting followed by informal social hour 

+ **JSM 2026 Shared Community Table** 
  + Call for volunteers to staff table will be sent early July 


*Past Events* 


+ **Meeting and Lightning Talks at ENAR 2026**
  + March 15, 2026 in Indianapolis, IN
  + Lighting talks presentation by 10 researchers
  + Energetic discussion afterwards
  + Attended by over 30 members of the MWDS Interest group
+ **First Business Meeting at JSM 2025**
  + Join us to discuss the group's goals, structure, and upcoming initiatives. Your input will be invaluable as we shape the future of this interest group.
  + August 5, 2025, at 1:00 PM CDT
  + H-Mockingbird 2 @ Omni Nashville Hotel
+ **Happy Hour at JSM 2025**
  + August 5th, 2025, 5-630pm Nashville, TN
  + Location TBA
